overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk along the sidewalk of Los Santos International Airport. The player moves past Terminal 3 with illuminated MyFly and Adios airline signage, encounters pedestrians and passing vehicles, and approaches a large FlyUS billboard. The environment features artificial lighting from street lamps and terminal buildings against a dark clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal 3 covered walkway with MyFly signage

events.description: pedestrians standing on sidewalk, one in blue dress and one in black and white outfit
dark colored vehicle with red tail lights drives past on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered terminal sidewalk, approaching a group of standing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress standing still on the sidewalk near the road
woman in black and white athletic wear standing and facing the road

entered.detail: overhead covered walkway structure with illuminated Terminal 3 MyFly signage hanging down
multi-story concrete parking garage with illuminated windows visible in the background
modern glass building facade with horizontal illuminated strips on the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a covered walkway under Terminal 3 MyFly at the airport. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk with a multi-story parking garage visible to the left and a modern glass terminal building to the right. Several pedestrians stand stationary on the sidewalk, and vehicles occasionally pass on the road to the left. The area is artificially lit by overhead lights and building illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal transition area with Adios signage and curving road

events.description: terminal signage changes from MyFly to Adios as the camera progresses along the terminal
large illuminated FlyUS billboard with airplane image comes into view on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the road curves gently to the right, passing a pedestrian in a pink shirt

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt and shorts walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead terminal structure with illuminated Terminal 3 Adios signage replacing the MyFly sign
large vertical billboard displaying a FlyUS airplane with red and blue livery against a white background

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the MyFly section to the Adios section of Terminal 3, with the overhead signage changing accordingly. The road begins to curve to the right, and a large FlyUS billboard becomes visible in the distance on the right. A pedestrian in a pink shirt walks past in the opposite direction. The parking garage recedes into the background as the walkway opens up slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: open airport road with prominent FlyUS billboard and elevated walkway

events.description: black sedan drives past on the road heading in the same direction as the camera
slight right turn following the curvature of the sidewalk and road

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk with the large FlyUS billboard dominating the right side of the view, vehicles passing on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: elevated covered walkway or bridge structure connecting terminal buildings on the left side
concrete barrier separating the sidewalk from a lower area or road on the right

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide exposed area with the large FlyUS billboard now prominently visible in the center-right of the frame. An elevated overpass bridge appears on the left. The sidewalk continues along a curved road with a concrete barrier on the right. Vehicles pass by on the road, and the terminal canopy from previous segments is no longer visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved airport access road passing the FlyUS billboard

events.description: FlyUS billboard passes out of view behind the camera as the walkway continues
black vehicle passes closely on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk past the FlyUS billboard area, approaching a more open section of the airport road

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the road, moving away from the camera with red tail lights visible

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the large FlyUS billboard, which exits the frame behind. The walkway continues along a curved section of the airport road with the elevated overpass now further ahead. The multi-story parking structure becomes visible again on the left. A black vehicle drives past on the road, and yellow directional barriers appear on the right side of the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along an airport sidewalk that transitions from a sheltered terminal walkway into a wide, exposed roadside area. It begins under the covered canopy of Terminal 3 MyFly, moving past a multi-story parking garage and stationary pedestrians under bright artificial lighting. As the camera advances, the overhead signage shifts to Adios and the walkway opens up, revealing a curving road and a distant FlyUS billboard while a pedestrian in a pink shirt passes by. The scene then expands into an open area where the billboard becomes prominent and an elevated overpass appears on the left, leaving the terminal canopy behind. Finally, the camera moves past the billboard and continues along the curved road, passing a black vehicle and yellow directional barriers as the parking structure reappears in the distance.
